positive: A whimsical and elegant stylized design featuring a central arrangement of stylized bioluminescent jellyfish and tropical foliage. The jellyfish should have flowing, exaggerated silhouettes and glowing, translucent forms, complemented by lush, jungle-inspired leaves (Monstera, fern, palm). The composition must be symmetrical, centered, and highly decorative, suitable for a seamless print. Use a deep indigo and turquoise color palette with vibrant neon accents for the glow. The overall aesthetic should be inspired by Art Nouveau and detailed botanical illustration, rendered with strong contrast and clean linework. Full shot, perfect symmetry, vector quality, highly decorative, flat graphic design, clean lines, central focus, perfect silhouette, high contrast, vibrant, breathable
negative: blurry, text, logo, watermark, signature, messy, noise, grain, artifact, jpeg artifacts, low resolution, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, extra limbs, distorted, anime, photo, realism
